channel.title: LLM Timeline — PleIAs Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from PleIAs.

item.title: Baguettotron (PleIAs)
item.description: Parameters: Baguettotron License: open Type: model "The name is both a nod to French origins and to the unusual shape of the model: with 80 layers, Baguettotron is currently the deepest SLM in its size range."

item.title: Pleias-RAG-350m (PleIAs)
item.description: Parameters: 350M License: open Type: model AI model by PleIAs

item.title: Pleias-RAG-1B (PleIAs)
item.description: Parameters: 1.2B License: open Type: model AI model by PleIAs

item.title: Pleias 1.0 350m (PleIAs)
item.description: Parameters: 350M License: open Type: model AI model by PleIAs

item.title: Pleias 1.0 1.2B (PleIAs)
item.description: Parameters: 1.2B License: open Type: model AI model by PleIAs

item.title: Pleias 1.0 (PleIAs)
item.description: Parameters: Pleias 1.0 License: open Type: model Trained on the Jean Zay supercomputer, 192x H100s for 20 days. Dataset is new CC + Synthetic: https://huggingface.co/datasets/PleIAs/common_corpus
